=====================================
Simple do with return
=====================================

def hello : IO Unit := do
  return ()

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (do
      (do_return
        value: (parenthesized)))))

=====================================
Do with let bind and return
=====================================

def readAndDouble : IO Nat := do
  let n ← readNat
  return n + n

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (do
      (let_bind
        name: (identifier)
        value: (identifier))
      (do_return
        value: (binary_expression
          left: (identifier)
          right: (identifier))))))

=====================================
Do with let mut and for loop
=====================================

def sumList (xs : List Nat) : IO Nat := do
  let mut total := 0
  for x in xs do
    total := total + x
  return total

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (identifier))))
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (do
      (let_mut
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number))
      (for_in
        var: (identifier)
        iterable: (identifier)
        body: (do
          (reassign
            name: (identifier)
            value: (binary_expression
              left: (identifier)
              right: (identifier)))))
      (do_return
        value: (identifier)))))

=====================================
Do with if-let in loop
=====================================

def processOptions (xs : List (Option Nat)) : IO (List Nat) := do
  let mut results : List Nat := []
  for x in xs do
    if let some n := x then
      results := n :: results
  return results

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (parenthesized
            (application
              name: (identifier)
              arguments: (identifier))))))
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (parenthesized
        (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (identifier))))
    body: (do
      (let_mut
        name: (identifier)
        type: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (identifier))
        value: (list))
      (for_in
        var: (identifier)
        iterable: (identifier)
        body: (do
          (do_if_let
            pattern: (constructor_pattern
              constructor: (identifier)
              arg: (identifier))
            value: (identifier)
            then: (reassign
              name: (identifier)
              value: (binary_expression
                left: (identifier)
                right: (identifier))))))
      (do_return
        value: (identifier)))))

=====================================
Nested do blocks
=====================================

def nestedDo : IO Unit := do
  for i in List.range 3 do
    for j in List.range 3 do
      IO.println s!"{i},{j}"

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (do
      (for_in
        var: (identifier)
        iterable: (application
          name: (projection
            term: (identifier)
            name: (identifier))
          arguments: (number))
        body: (do
          (for_in
            var: (identifier)
            iterable: (application
              name: (projection
                term: (identifier)
                name: (identifier))
              arguments: (number))
            body: (do
              (application
                name: (application
                  name: (projection
                    term: (identifier)
                    name: (identifier))
                  arguments: (identifier))
                arguments: (string
                  (interpolation
                    (identifier))
                  (interpolation
                    (identifier)))))))))))

=====================================
Do with match
=====================================

def describeList (xs : List Nat) : IO Unit := do
  match xs with
  | [] => IO.println "empty"
  | _ => IO.println "non-empty"

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (identifier))))
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (do
      (do_match
        scrutinees: (identifier)
        (do_match_arm
          patterns: (list)
          body: (application
            name: (projection
              term: (identifier)
              name: (identifier))
            arguments: (string)))
        (do_match_arm
          patterns: (hole)
          body: (application
            name: (projection
              term: (identifier)
              name: (identifier))
            arguments: (string)))))))

=====================================
Id.run do block
=====================================

def buildArray : Array Nat := Id.run do
  let mut result : Array Nat := #[]
  for i in List.range 5 do
    result := result.push i
  return result

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (identifier))
    body: (application
      name: (projection
        term: (identifier)
        name: (identifier))
      arguments: (do
        (let_mut
          name: (identifier)
          type: (application
            name: (identifier)
            arguments: (identifier))
          value: (array))
        (for_in
          var: (identifier)
          iterable: (application
            name: (projection
              term: (identifier)
              name: (identifier))
            arguments: (number))
          body: (do
            (reassign
              name: (identifier)
              value: (application
                name: (projection
                  term: (identifier)
                  name: (identifier))
                arguments: (identifier)))))
        (do_return
          value: (identifier))))))
